<circle id="circle" cx="272.654" cy="218.908" r="9.25" class="club-point"/>
<style>
.club-point {
  fill: #1e90ff;
  animation: pulse 2s infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
  0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
  50% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: 0.7; }
  100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
}
</style>
</svg>
